purpose: Single source of truth for Vehicle Forge file versioning

CANON_SOURCE.description: The weapon catalogue and CANON_BUILDS array embedded in vehicle-forge.html. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the live tool.

vehicle-forge.html.role: Live tool with embedded CANON_BUILDS (47 vehicles) and WEAPONS catalogue (127 weapons)

PACK_VFX.description: Downloadable vehicle packs in .vfx format. These are what users import into the tool.

PACK_CVF.description: Same packs in .cvf.json format (newer format). Should be identical content to .vfx counterparts.

V5_DATA.description: v5.0 data directory. Build/calibration data used during development.
V5_DATA.status: REVIEW — may be superseded by packs/

ROOT_EXPORTS.description: Root-level JSON/VFX exports. May be stale copies.

ARCHIVE.description: Archived v4.0 preset packs. Empty placeholder files.
